reviews.review_description:
Exemplary. Wonderful. Haute couture. Sublime. A masterpiece.
Symphonic in its essence. Profound in its advancement of play.
This is an example of a hallmark of excellence. Surpasses expectations.

I enjoy this solitaire game. I do wish it had more options such as 3 card flipping and other versions of solitaire. Like spider pyramid est.  I like the different cards as well. (Animals would be nice 🙂) Look forward to seeing what they do with this. Keep up the good work.
I only play solitaire drawing 3 cards at a time, so I can't really enjoy this app until that option is added.

I love this app. for the end of the day calming down time. I love the new cards but can we get other solitaire games on this. Love to have one or more of spiders, twin towers, golf, ect. so I can play a little longer. Once or twice playing this app. I leave to find another calming game. Thank you for putting this on meda, I to see more different solitaire games.

It’s exactly what it says… a great VR solitaire game.  I’d give it 5 stars except it was frustrating to play for a while until I figured out how to move the board around.

As another reviewer pointed out, just point your controller at one of the “handles” on either side of the playing area and squeeze the grip trigger and you can move the board around to a better viewing position.  It is right in your face to start with.

Adding a simple “controls” or “how to play screen” would solve this major problem that i’m sure turns many away if they don’t stumble upon how to do this.

It would also be nice to have other styles such as free cell.

Pass through is a great option when  you are somewhere and you still want to be aware of your surroundings…. play is great and it works well.

￼ ready i’d give it more but I run out of stars really a great game easy to play good graphics wish there was more I am 88 wish they could make more ￼ solitaire games, like golf pyramid any others thanks for the enjoyment ￼￼


Play this morning. Wow must’ve updated. No it does everything I can get close to the game different cards move the cars around. i still  give it 6 stars nice job￼￼❤️👍🥹￼


Wish list golf and pyramid Solitaire if possible thank you. Keep up the good apps￼


How do I get my Regular cards to play Instead of all the goofy ones it was playing, flying until the new update and now I can’t play with those new cards. I cannot make out kings and queens and all them goofy ones that I know nothing about. Please let me know how I can get my original cards thank you. ￼￼￼￼





My update is playing great, but I can’t play my default cards everything but my Default cards please check this out and correct. Thank you. ￼


I just wanted to say thank you and all your workers for making an old man happy again enjoying it as usual it’s a number six in my game. Anyway thanks again.T DUKe￼


Could you please turn on The fall cards I cannot play the other ones I can’t see the corners are too small. I appreciate if you can help. My wife just went in the nursing home I’m 89 years old and I really like solitaire. I am sure would appreciate it. It gives me Relaxing When she’s not here, thank you very much ￼￼￼￼￼￼


   ￼￼
Why does this app no longer work on passthrough mode?? I will change my review when it comes back!! This is upsetting!!
Point at one of the brown bars on either side.  Press both trigger and grip of same controller. Move board as desired then release.
The deck is too near your face and unable to move it, so gave up and removed it!

developer_response.body: You can move the play area by grabbing (either directly or with the laser pointer) any of the handles on the sides. That's what they are there for! :)

reviews.review_title: Concept okay, not very good in VR
reviews.review_description: Generally a good concept but as other reviewers have pointed out, poorly executed. My biggest gripe is the deck is one size with no ability to shrink or expand, and it’s right up in my face which means i have to position my wrist at an odd angle to interact with the cards. It has promise but needs a lot of work. Shocked that something as simple as solitaire is so hard to get right.

So I have started winning my games. 

The trick is to use the left controller to select and place cards.
Once you go through the deck, just click the blank right deck and the remaining cards will appear. 
Keep in mind all games have a critical card play that determines you winning the game.

The selection process can be 'sticky' sometimes and your card or cards can be in weird angles. 
Just hover over the card with your left controller,  highlight and select. 

Enjoy!

uninstalling after playing once because in my first game, the bottom card of the draw pile ended up glitched and i was not able to draw it. i had every single other card out and played, just needed that one and it would not let me select it. kinda bummed because the rest of the game seemed cool. if they worked out the bugs, it would definitely be better

In its currant state, one of the most primitive VR games out there. 
After seeing the offerings on Steam and Vive I had high hopes but this is about as basic as you can get for a card game. As the title says, unimpressed.
This is the first proper Solitaire on the platform?! It’s incredibly intuitive and well built. Devs: please add more decks and backgrounds!

You only have 2 choices from a list in settings. Hard to tell playing classic or Vegas style 🤔. Only thing that gives it a spark is playing in pass through. When you are playing sometimes the card " stick in your face" kinda annoying. But I'll play a few games before bed. No stimulation . Needs a little animation and how the game is played worldwide 🌐.
A new way to play Solitaire. Nice. I like the passthrough mode.

The game mechanics need work.  My issues was the drawn card was under my chin (too close to grab) and card pick/place was awkward (better after a little practice).  I have other solitaire games that I like better, maybe VR isn’t the medium for me…

developer_response.body: Might be a bit late, but an update just dropped and now the cards grabbed with the laser pointer no longer fly towards your hand (and outside of your vision) but they float in front / over the other cards!
